title: FarmColonies
description: A modpack focused around farming, animal husbandry, colony life & more!
body:
**FarmColonies** is a modpack that invites you to build a thriving community in a world brimming with life. With **Minecolonies**, you’ll establish settlements and manage your colonists, each with unique skills and talents. **SWEM** horses will add an extra layer of realism to otherwise mundane vanilla horses. Now they're loyal companions, helping you explore the diverse landscapes generated by a mix of **realistic** and **fantastical** terrain.

But be warned, the wild is full of surprises! **Naturalist** adds a layer of realism to the world around you, requiring you to . And with a variety of **quality of life mods**, you’ll find your experience enhanced with convenient features and helpful tools.

**Farmers Delight** adds a plethora of new crops, foods, and farming tools, making your agricultural endeavors even more rewarding. You'll find yourself cultivating a wide variety of produce, from humble carrots to exotic fruits, and crafting delicious dishes that will keep your colonists happy and healthy.

**Doggy Talents Next** allows you to train your canine companions to become even more helpful and loyal. You can teach them tricks, assign them specific tasks, and even breed them for unique abilities. With a loyal dog by your side, you'll be ready to face any challenge!

**Some of the promenent QoL mods:**
- **Jade** helps you to easily identify what you're looking at.
- **Falling Tree** simplifies lumberjacking.
- **Comforts** adds cozy furniture and decorations.
- **AppleSkin** lets you track your hunger and health.
- **Ambient Sounds** immerses you in the world.
- **Simple Voice Chat** makes communication with your friends a breeze.
- **JourneyMap** for a world map, minimap and waypoints to easily find your way home.
- **Sophisticated Backpacks** for more storage on the go.
- **Sophisticated Storage** for more expansive storage back home.

Are you ready to build a farm, establish colonies, and conquer the wild?
